trials.supervisor_analysis: Baseline established at score 60.80 (3.17ms with torch.compile, baseline 3.42ms). Profiling shows ConvTranspose3d at 64.4%, elementwise at 24.8%, AvgPool at 10.5%. Advancing to optimization stage.

nudges.text: Your manual Triton kernel for the post-conv fusion is 10x slower than baseline. Before spending more time debugging it, try `torch.compile` as a quick optimization lever — wrap the forward method or the post-conv operations with `torch.compile(mode="default")` in your `ModelNew`. The profiling showed ~35% time in transpose ops and ~25% in elementwise ops that the compiler may fuse automatically. You can always return to the manual Triton kernel later if torch.compile doesn't give enough speedup.
